name: Kurovychi Lake
description: A private water body for calm trips where carp, crucian carp and grass carp are common catches.

name: Prylbychi Pond
description: A sport fishing water with paid access and steady bites on feeder and float rigs.

name: Soluky Pond
description: A water body near Lviv with good banks and several spots for feeder and float fishing.

name: Shchyrets Reservoir
description: A popular water body for trips targeting crucian carp, bream and smaller carp.

name: Briukhovychi Lake
description: A convenient city-side trip where float and light feeder rigs work consistently.

name: Druzhba Fishing Base
description: A fishing base with multiple depth zones and promising predator spots.
